evidence.claim: Designed hybrid retrieval system (BM25 + dense vector) serving 50M+ queries/month
evidence.source_text: designed the company's first hybrid retrieval system combining BM25 with dense vector recall, serving 50M+ queries per month

evidence.claim: Proficiency in GANs, Semantic Search, QLoRA, pgvector, Pinecone, BM25, LLMs, RAG, Qdrant, Sentence Transformers, LlamaIndex, Python, OpenSearch
evidence.source_text: Skills: GANs, Semantic Search, QLoRA, pgvector, Pinecone, BM25, LLMs, RAG, Qdrant, Sentence Transformers, LlamaIndex, Python, OpenSearch

evidence.claim: Designed exploration-exploitation policy using Thompson sampling improving new-user retention by 11%
evidence.source_text: I designed an exploration-exploitation policy using Thompson sampling that improved new-user retention by 11% in the first month.

evidence.claim: Led a team of 4 engineers across a semantic search rollout
evidence.source_text: Led a team of 4 engineers across the rollout.

evidence.claim: Reduced p95 retrieval latency by 60% and improved NDCG@10 by 18%
evidence.source_text: The new system reduced p95 retrieval latency by 60% while improving NDCG@10 by 18% on our held-out eval set.

evidence.claim: Improved recruiter engagement by 24% and reduced time-to-shortlist by 38%
evidence.source_text: The final embedding ranker improved recruiter engagement metrics by 24% and reduced the average time-to-shortlist by 38%.
Mentored two junior engineers through this rollout.

evidence.claim: Completed Deep Learning and NLP Specializations
evidence.source_text: Certifications: Deep Learning Specialization (Coursera/DeepLearning.AI, 2018); NLP Specialization (Coursera/DeepLearning.AI, 2023)

evidence.claim: Prioritizes shipping working systems in 6 weeks over theoretical perfection
evidence.source_text: I care more about shipping a working system in 6 weeks than a theoretically perfect one in 6 months.
